query:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blocks b
           WHERE block_type = ?1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
             AND (?2 IS NULL OR b.space_id = ?2)
             AND NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1 FROM block_properties bp
                  WHERE bp.block_id = b.id
                    AND bp.key = 'view_type'
                    AND bp.value_text = 'query-view')
